title: Personal & Corporate Banking | MSME & Agri banking - IDBI Bank
content:
IDBI Loan for Services Sector (ILSS) can be extended to all kind of business enterprises, self-employed and professionals, engaged in providing or rendering service. 
Some examples of the service sector enterprises and professionals are a. Chartered Accountants, Company Secretaries, Engineers, Architects, Surveyors, Interior designers, Management Consultants etc. b. Contractors, Travel Agents & Tour Operators, Clearing & forwarding agents, Beauty parlors etc. 
All kind of business enterprises, self-employed and professionals, engaged in providing or rendering service.
OD/CC: To meet Working Capital requirements Term Loan: For Purchase of business premises, equipment, computers, furnitures, undertaking development/expansion/additions/repairs and renovation of business premises and infrastructure. 
Term Loan: Max 7 years CC/OD: Max 12 months (Annual renewal) 
Linked to banks Repo Linked Lending Rate (RLLR) and Rating
  * Term Loan: Exclusive Charge on assets created out of bank finance.
  * Working Capital: Hypothecation of stock, book debts and assets created out of bank finance.


Cash Credit : 25% on stock and Book debts Overdraft : NIL Term loan : 25 %

metadata.description: IDBI Bank offers a wide range of products from savings and current bank account to loans for retail and msme customers  or agri loans to farmers. Apply Now.
metadata.keywords: Internet Banking, savings account, Debit Card, personal loans, home loans, loans, fixed deposits
